name: Soundstage Great Northern Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Cornstarch dissolved in 2/3 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in water to cover overnight.
2. Drain and rinse the beans, then place them in a large soup pot with 10 cups of fresh water and bouillon cubes.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer.
4. Cook for 1 hour until the beans are tender but firm on the inside.
5. Add celery, onion, and carrot; cook for an additional 30 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
6. Add smoked ham, tomato, salt, pepper, and thyme; mix well.
7. Cook for another 10 minutes.
8. Stir in the cornstarch mixture and water; simmer for 5-10 minutes until the sauce thickens.
9. Remove from heat, let cool for 10-15 minutes.
10. Mix well and serve.
